script_text: Every letter of the alphabet makes a special sound.
voice_direction: Warm calm kindergarten teacher voice. Natural pacing. Do not stretch or exaggerate any sounds.

script_text: Look at the letter S. It hisses like a snake.
voice_direction: Warm calm kindergarten teacher voice. Natural pacing. Do not stretch or exaggerate any sounds.

script_text: The letter M. Like something yummy.
voice_direction: Warm calm kindergarten teacher voice. Natural pacing. Do not stretch or exaggerate any sounds.

script_text: The letter T. Like a ticking clock.
voice_direction: Warm calm kindergarten teacher voice. Natural pacing. Do not stretch or exaggerate any sounds.

script_text: Look at the letter B. What sound does B make?
voice_direction: Warm calm kindergarten teacher voice. Natural pacing. Do not stretch or exaggerate any sounds.

script_text: Now the letters D and F. Listen to each sound.
voice_direction: Warm calm kindergarten teacher voice. Natural pacing. Do not stretch or exaggerate any sounds.

script_text: A is for apple. B is for ball. The picture helps you remember the sound.
voice_direction: Warm calm kindergarten teacher voice. Natural pacing. Do not stretch or exaggerate any sounds.
